description: puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalistic design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these puma Hopper sandals are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. The sandals are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style. Upper Canvas upper with mild padded lining for snug Fit Velcro straps for easy movement Textured footbed with ergonomical fit and massage nubs for utmost comfort Midsole Shock-absorbing lightweight phylon midsole for added comfort Outsole Rubber lugs in V-shaped pattern for firm grip on uneven terrain 3D brand logo at the centre shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
